text: You start to wail on the safe, throwing haymakers, punches, and kicks to no effect. Eventually you start to bang your head against the safe. Either this thing will break open or you will. As you continue to pit your determination and new concussion against the steel walls of the safe times passes you in a blur. When you look up again the sun has risen high in the sky, with a sinking feeling in your gut you turn around to see 2 guards staring at you. One says “I’m Yasaton, an undercover guard and you're under arrest!”
